entry.title: Re: Public Cloud Re-run Pricing
entry.content: Hello, There are already actions available in sales order UI (Fiori and WebGUI), can you please clarify what channel you need to trigger re-pricing? Can you also explain what pricing type you want to use? Thanks!

entry.title: Re: Depreciation areas 92 and 93 not available for Sweden
entry.content: Anybody else having any comment or solution for this?

entry.title: Re: How to allocate for integer measure in SAC
entry.content:
@raviv7 

Irrespective of whether you use standard allocation or Advanced formula, because you allocation weights are in decimals, it will generate decimal results but because your final result is an integer measure, the results will get truncated. You will need a measure with decimal precision to handle this.

 

Nikhil

entry.title: Re: Compensation integration with Benefits and LMS
entry.content:
Hi @mathivanans 

There is no out of the box integration between Comp and these modules. Comp gets its data from EC or MDF, and can publish data to EC or MDF. Data from Comp can be exported during planning cycles with API or through FTP export.

 

Here are a few links : 

  • Getting data from an MDF object 
  • API for Compensation module :
    • What's New Viewer
    • Comp Module API page on Business Accelerator Hub
    • Example and other comments.
  • FTP exports examples: 
    • Example 1
    • Example 2

All the best

Xavier

entry.title: Defaulting Pick-Up Dates on Freight Units
entry.content:
Hi, I am trying to understand how the below dates can be auto-populated. At the moment, I am using the condition for PU/DLV window determination in the FU type config to drive the dates. I was able to get the dates under Destination populated correctly using the values in the condition table shown below. However, I don't seem to be able to do the same with those dates for the source. Note that I have tried with populating values in the condition table for earliest stay, premature stay, delayed stay and latest stay for the TO Stop Category 'O'. Did I misunderstand the use of those fields? Appreciate any pointers to have the dates under Source populated.

Destination

Start Date (Requested) = Delivery Date

End Date (Requested) = Delivery Date + Delayed Stay (from condition table)

End Date (Acceptable) = Delivery Date + Latest Stay (from condition table)

Example of the condition table:

Cheers

SFC

entry.title: Re: Compensation integration with Benefits and LMS
entry.content: Thanks @xavierlegarrec

entry.title: 在进行物料成本估算时，是否能只按天或者日期进行选择物料，只估算没有进行成本估算的物料，如何处理？
entry.content: #SAP S4HANA Cloud #SAP S4HANA Cloud Public #SAP S4HANA Cloud Public Edition #SAP S4HANA Cloud Public Edition 财务#在进行物料成本估算时，是否能只按天或者日期进行选择物料，只估算没有进行成本估算的物料，如何处理？因为物料太多，需每天进行物料成本的估算，能否只跑未进行成本估算的物料，而不所有物料都重新进行成本估算，如何处理？感谢

entry.title: Re: Script to Control Measure in SAP Analytics Cloud Tabl...
entry.content:
Hi,

We can configure Range slider with the setting enabled "Enable the writeback in runtime" and write the values to 2 different Script variables.

Create a calculated measure with the if condition =if(Measure1 < Scriptvariable_1 and Measure >Scriptvariable_2, Measure1,0) and enable Zero suppression in the table.

I have assumed that the table contains only 1 measure.

Thanks,

Jain

entry.title: Re: SAC story Report format issue
entry.content:
@yoursraghu986 

For issue 1, changing (100) to -100 you can change in formatting options> Show sign as

For defining thresholds you can do it from Builder panel or table options.

Threshold definition.

 

Finally change the option to show values in color rather than symbol in formatting option.

Final Result

Hope this helps !!

Nikhil

entry.title: Re: Comparing GHG Protocol and ISO 14064-1: How SAP SFM could support both frameworks

entry.title: Re: 採購單與供應商發票報表
entry.content:
Hello,

There is no standard report/app to meet you requirement. Could you please consider using following CDS views to create custom report?

I_SupplierInvoiceAPI01 
I_SuplrInvcItemPurOrdRefAPI01
I_SuplrInvoiceItemGLAcctAPI01

Please also refer to the SAP Help documentation with regards to CDS views for Invoice Management:
https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/c0c54048d35849128be8e872df5bea6d/01d53e3c4cde4dcd8e26f9cba21ad35c.html?locale=en-US

Also, from the app "View Browser" if you search by component area it shows if the CDS View is released or not.

entry.title: Cut over activities for Spain payroll implementation.
entry.content:
Hi Team, 

We are currently in the process of implementing payroll for our customer in Spain, with a mid-year go-live.

To ensure a smooth transition, we request comprehensive details regarding the wage types that need to be loaded into the payroll system.

Any relevant SAP notes or KBA articles would be greatly appreciated.

Thanks,            HCM Payroll Spain  

Krishna

entry.title: Re: ATP & MRP Areas
entry.content:
Hi @Nansy_Matary ,

the MRP areas are exactly to do a separation of stock/supply/demand elements, putting them 'together' is not a goal of the MRP area.

However, you can use the Alternative-Based Confirmation (ABC) capability to check ATP in multiple storage locations during sales order processing and come up with a confirmation that consists of one or multiple storage locations. An example: Example: Substitute Storage Location Determination 

Regards,
Andreas

entry.title: GRC Tuesdays: SAP Risk and Assurance Management and EuroprivacyTM/® for GDPR Certification
entry.content:
“If you think compliance is expensive, try non-compliance”. I am sure you know this quote from Paul McNulty, former U.S. Deputy Attorney General. And looking at the top risks for 2025 with “Compliance and Regulations” super-inflation still being a major cause for concern for companies world-wide, it looks like Compliance and the risk of penalties associated with non-conformity will continue to be a heavy burden for the foreseeable future.

To better understand which were the most often cited regulations, I decided to analyse last years’ 2023-2024 annual reports for the top 30 US and top 30 EU listed companies.

Undeniably, Data Privacy & Protection and Data Security laws were trusting the first spots.

As a result, I thought it would be relevant to explain what SAP is doing to help companies streamline their compliance on Data Privacy. Especially when it comes to the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) since regulatory breach here could end up with significant penalties: up to 20 million Euros or 4% of the worldwide turnover whichever is the highest… Paul McNulty’s quote on cost of non-compliance is definitely applicable here!

 

SAP Risk and Assurance Management for control and risk

 

Within the SAP Governance, Risk, and Compliance (GRC) portfolio, SAP Risk and Assurance Management is our cloud offering for risk and control management.

Covering the entire cycle from identifying and assessing risks, to documenting and linking relevant controls, automating them and remediating any issues, it enables companies to monitor and assess inconsistencies in processes, operating procedures, policies, etc.

But if software helps automate the process, one key requirement is to have the right controls documented to start with. And here, SAP has partnered with Europrivacy™/®.

 

Europrivacy: the official European Data Protection Seal for GDPR certification

 

Europrivacy is a certification scheme researched and developed through the European Research Programme to assess, document, certify and value compliance with the GDPR and complementary data protection regulations.

It is maintained by the European Centre for Certification and Privacy (ECCP) in Luxembourg under the supervision of an International Board of Experts in data protection.

Nevertheless, it is far more than a certification scheme. It provides a comprehensive set of online resources and services to effectively implement, enhance and demonstrate data protection compliance. It is supported by an ecosystem of qualified partners, the Europrivacy online Academy, the Community website, and online tools.

It presents numerous benefits and advantages. As a matter of fact, there are at least 10 (very good) reasons to embrace a Europrivacy certification:

  1. Build trust and confidence with your partners, investors, and end-users
  2. Identify and reduce legal, financial, and reputational risks
  3. Check and demonstrate GDPR compliance
  4. Develop a competitive advantage
  5. Turn compliance into value and a source of revenue
  6. Improve reputation and access to market
  7. Facilitate data transfers (cross-border and processor)
  8. Easily extend compliance to non-European Union jurisdictions and other EU regulations
  9. Receive regulatory updates
  10. Legally recognized by all European Union and European Economic Area Member States

As an official Europrivacy partner, SAP has developed a user-friendly solution that enables Applicants to prepare and document their compliance for the Europrivacy certification. SAP offers a solution to:

  1. Review and document the compliance of your data processing;
  2. Identify potential non conformity;
  3. Inform you when you have reached the level of readiness to start the certification.

 

How does this work?

 

To benefit from this content, the process itself is rather simple and is summarized below:

 

1

In the existing tenant, authorized user can open the Manage Business Content Packages app and locate the Europrivacy content ready for installation.

 

2

Specify the target tenant where you want this content deployed to. Details here are available in the Process for Content Consumers page.

Survey-type Manual Procedures will then be made available automatically in your SAP Risk and Assurance Management instance.

 

3

Once activated, assign the Manual Procedures to a Control, and then to a Work Package for it to be triggered

 

4

Lay back, track progress and monitor results in the Manual Procedures Overview App

 

Next-generation (Privacy) control & risk solution for the cloud

 

Combining best of both worlds: best in class GRC software with SAP Risk and Assurance Management and continuously monitored and updated requirements by an International Board of Experts from Europrivacy, companies can:

  • Leverage one platform for many use cases across the enterprise – including Data Privacy of course but also Financial Compliance, Operational Efficiency, Tax Management and more
  • Transform governance, risk, and compliance (GRC) from a cost factor (imposing task) to a strategic differentiator (business optimization)
  • Integrate natively into S/4HANA Public Cloud, Private Cloud Edition, or on-premise as well to avoid data replication
  • Align with regulatory changes and jurisprudences

 

Interested in learning more?

 

If you’d like to investigate further, I have added below a few links that I think will be helpful:

  • Overview of SAP Risk and Assurance Management – including a short product video
  • Europrivacy Resources, Tools and Trainings
  • Design Manual Procedures in SAP Risk and Assurance Management
  • Europrivacy LinkedIn account and Youtube channel

What about you, how does your company manage Data Privacy regulations? I look forward to reading your thoughts and comments either on this blog or on Twitter @TFrenehard

*Europrivacy is a trademark registered in several jurisdictions

Hi All,

entry.title: Re: Early Inspection Lot for Co-Product material.
entry.content:
Greetings,

I don't think this is possible. In this scenario you would need to have two inspection lots with same origin created at order release. You could however have one 03 (in process) origin and one 17 origin (at goods receipt) but unfortunately 03 inspection lot is not stock relevant.

Similar issue is with coproduct inspection at goods receipt because EWM does not support miscellaneous inspection (inspection type 05) - see note 2545012. Furthermore, inspection lots with 17 origin cannot be create manually. 

Best regards, M.

entry.title: sap gui installation issue
entry.content:
I get error message  "Searching for WWI installed by InstallShield Installer... --- WWI is not installed..." during sap gui installation on Windows Server 2019. pls let me know how to resolve

SAP version: SAP GUI 760

entry.title: Regarding product receiving and invoice processing
entry.content:
Hello, I"m Hansol"s Jeong Yeonjae.
I"m inquiring about product receiving and invoice processing.
The amount is calculated by quantity * unit price, and when it is received, the first decimal place must be 6 or higher, and when the invoice is processed, the first decimal place must be 5 or higher.
Do you need to modify the SAP setting by any chance?
Please answer me.
Thank you.

entry.title: Re: Fiori elements: returning values when doing intent ba...
entry.content:
Hi Robert,

For the navigation back: please try 'backToPreviousApp' , link

with CrossApplicationNavigation service(link) as below: -

//say in App B to App A without losing the draft
onNavBack: function () {
    var oCrossAppNav = sap.ushell.Container.getService("CrossApplicationNavigation");
    oCrossAppNav.backToPreviousApp();
}

Thanks,

Jakes

entry.title: Re: View payment proposal that was created using ‘Automat...
entry.content: And in the Manage Automatic Payments app, you can switch to the Proposals Processed tab to view the proposals created.

entry.title: Re: Manage forms GRDC (Group reporting)
entry.content: Sorry this is an missing feature in current version. just like KBA 2646756 - SAP Group Reporting Data Collection - Limitations and Known Issues https://me.sap.com/notes/2646756 " Known issues to be fixed for multiple periods and multiple fiscal years - To add a period to a year-to-date form, you must enable the FINCS_DTXI_MULTI_PER_YTD toggle in your SAP S/4HANA system. - You can't select fiscal year as a dimension when you create or edit a form. We are trying to fix it in near future.

entry.title: Re: Payment Request Clearing Account
entry.content:
Dear Frank,

If i understand your example correctly:

  1. The invoice 5100000001 was posted with amount -357 in credit side;
  2. The payment document 200000002 was posted via the app Free Form Payment;  amount 119 was posted into the 10300001 account in debit side; amount 119 was posted into the payment request clearing account in credit side. 
  3. The payment document 1500000005 was posted. It clears the two items of supplier account 10300001 posted in previous steps. 

The problem that the G/L account 21900000 has one open item because you haven't completed the process for step 2 when you poste an payment request via the free from payment. There are two steps to create a payment by using the Free Form Payment. 

1. The payment request will be posted, a document will be created. 

2. The automatic payment program for payment request will be scheduled by the app Free Form Payment automaticity in backend. A payment document will be posted by the automatic payment program. 

Here is the post scheme:

First document (Free Form Payment):

Credit:  21900000             119-

Debit :  10300001                119

Second document (Payment Run):

Credit: 11001020 (Bank in Transition)     119-

Debit:  21900000                                   119

The second document is not posted yet. 

 

Please have a look at the app 'Automatic Payment Transaction for Payment Request'. and check whether the payment run for the payment request has carried out the posting, if not, please check the log and fix the issue and reschedule the payment run. Once the second document has posted, the open item amount 119- in the G/L account 21900000 will be cleared. 

 

Best regards

Hongliang

entry.title: Re: How to allocate for integer measure in SAC
entry.content:
Hi Nikhil,

Thanks for the answer. I agree with the point. Only decimal measure can give the exact result. But there is one concept in BPC, we can add all the previous values and subtract with total then replace the result with last value.

For Example, 

After allocation my Total is 18 due to the integer measure.

Product 1 =9

Product 2 = 9

Aggregate the previous values 17 (9+8) excluding the last combination in Product 2.

Now subtract overall total 22 with 17.

22-17 =5. Now this 5 will be replaced in the last combination.

Product 1=9

Product 2= 8 +5 =13

Now the total matches with 22.

Similar to this any logics available in SAC ?

Thanks,

Ravi

entry.title: Determine Partner from one Bill To party to Multiple Sold To parties
entry.content:
Hi Experts, 

Settlement Management- Condition Contracts.

We have a scenario where we have one Bill- To assigned to Multiple Sold-To Parties. During settlement in Condition contracts, from Bill To party the correct Sold to Party has to be determined from business volume and price of that sold to has to be determined in the Settlement Document from condition records to settle to the customer.

Settlement Management SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Sales SAP S/4HANA

entry.title: Re: Pool/parallel/ihm in HANA
entry.content:
Hi,
This heap allocator is consuming more than 50% of our system memory and leading to several OOM events. How do I optimize it?

In the KBA# 1999997, this allocator is linked to OLAP aggregation results, so will the use of "NO_USE_OLAP_PLAN" hint help here?

Thanks.

Nilay

Abhishek

entry.title: Re: Joule speaks ABAP!
entry.content:
Hello @AlexanderRother 

We have a 8009282 (Pay-As-You-Go for SAP BTP for cloud test, demo, and development) and added 8019541 (Cloud test, demo, and development for Joule for developers, ABAP AI capabilities) as @karl_kessler mentioned. Now we have it as an additional Service listed in the state "service booked" since 5 days now. When we access our SAP BTP ABAP environment (Provider: Amazon Web Services (AWS), Region: Europe (Frankfurt), Environment: Multi-Environment, Used for Production: No, Beta Features: Enabled, Plan: standard plan) with eclipse (2025-03, 4.35.0, ADT 3.48) just says in the joule window that we should change the project to another one where Joule is enabled.
Authorization/Roles are also checked that SAP_A4C_BC_DEV_AIQ_PC is part of our roles for the devs.

And here we are, what have we missed that we can still not use it?

edit: we set the flag in our subacc for production to yes, still not working

entry.title: Re: Help with setup of SAP Ariba Buying, Base Edition (Scope Item 4AI)
entry.content: @ElisabethE Hi, sadly we didnt get to the bottom of the issue because it wasnt a priority topic for us and the provided answer here didnt help us a lot. If you however are able to find out how to resolve the issue please let me know.

entry.title: Re: 在进行物料成本估算时，是否能只按天或者日期进行选择物料，只估算没有进行成本估算的物料，如何处理？
entry.content:
Here's the English translation:

When you make a material cost estimate, can you select materials by day or date only, and only estimate materials for which no cost estimate has taken place, what can you do?

#S4HANA Cloud #S4HANA Cloud Public #SAP S4HANA Cloud Public Edition #S4HANA Cloud Public Edition Finance Can you select materials by day or date only, only materials that have not been costed, and what to do when making a material cost estimate? Because there are too many materials to be costed on a daily basis, can you run through only the materials that have not been costed, and not all materials are re-costed, what can you do? Thank you

entry.title: SCC handshake failed : 401-Unauthorized
entry.content:
SCC handshake failed:401 - Unauthorized when trying to renew certificate in Cloud connector


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: SCC handshake failed : 401-Unauthorized
entry.content:
Please check relevant KBA 2571763 - Authorization problem in SAP Cloud Connector when adding Cloud Foundry subaccount

  • The password from the SAP Universal ID is managed in a different URL (https://account.sap.com for SAP Universal ID) than the one mentioned above and this SAP Universal ID password does not work.
  • The same password must be used as which is used to access https://accounts.sap.com (in other words, the password of the specific S-User ID related to the email address).

If you do not remember them or mix them, please kindly use below steps to reset them then clean the cache and cookies to login again:

  • Reset password of S-user 

Go to Forgot My Password

Tip: Although you could enter email address, it is recommended to enter the S-User ID, especially if you have more than one S-User ID linked by email address.

  • Reset password of U-ID:

2882938 - How to reset or change SAP Universal ID (UID) password

entry.title: Re: Mass upload basic data text
entry.content:
Hello Vera,

unfortunately there is no standard app available to create the basic text. As you mentioned it is possible to update only.

As an alternative you can use the API to insert a text. Attached you find the link to the API which allows the creation of texts:
https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/3c916ef10fc240c9afc594b346ffaf77/2314f308af0e464796d9676f0db98a81.html?locale=en-US

Regards Johannes

entry.title: How to create an IM PI document for a SLOC which is total empty?
entry.content:
Hi 

I would like to create an IM PI document in MI01 transaction but the SLOC is total empty right now and I cannot create a blank document becasue of error: Document does not contain any items. And if I enter the material then another error: Item 001: No batches that can be included in phys. inv. exist for xxxx . 

My user case is, we found physically a new material in a Storage location which material does not existed before on that SLOC and the SLOC is full empty now (no any other material exist on SLOC) so we want to increase the stock of the found material but system does not allow to add just 1 new material to an empty SLOC. How can we do the inventory?

Thanks,
Istvan

entry.title: Re: How to allocate for integer measure in SAC
entry.content: You will have to write this logic of aggregating the previous and then subtracting from total and then assigning it to the last product combination. No readymade logic available.

entry.title: Re: cannot reschedule test after a failed test
entry.content: This article should help: https://learning.sap.com/helpcenter/certification-support/how-to-stay-certified#i-have-failed-the-exam-how-soon-can-i-reschedule-an-exam-after-failing-it

entry.title: Re: Joule speaks ABAP!
entry.content:
Hi Community,

"ABAP is SAP’s proprietary programming language and ABAP technology is the solid foundation for both the classic ERP and SAP’s flagship ERP SAP S/4HANA Cloud. Bundled with our strong ABAP development community, the impact and the value of generative AI support for ABAP is obvious. Consequently, SAP decided to invest heavily in the development of Joule skills as well as training and fine-tuning large language models specifically for ABAP."

 

Thanks for your sharing, it really help us a lot.

 

🙂

 

Regards,

ZFiori.

entry.title: Trip Data Inconsistencies
entry.content:
Trip Data Inconsistencies (Tables: PTRV_HEAD, PTRV_PERIO, PCL1)

Hello everyone,

when we call up PR05 – for a specific trip – we get an error message.
Error message 56149 – No cluster with personnel number xxx trip xxxxx pers. ins. 99 exists.
The system tried to read a cluster TE that does not exist. It is possible that the trip data in the tables PTRV_HEAD, PTRV_PERIO and PCL1 (cluster TE) contains data inconsistencies.

Use report RPRDETEC to find and correct possible data inconsistencies.
We have called up the report RPRDETEC in display mode.

Then I see at the bottom that there are no entries in table PCL1.
How do I get the entries into the table, or what do you do in such a case?

Delete the data with the report RPRDETEC and create it again?

many thanks.

entry.title: Re: S4/HANA Table TVAUK / transaction OVF3 - cost centre...
entry.content:
You need to maintain the cost center and valid date at the same time when you create the record.

If you only maintain cost center and leave valid date as blank, then error message "date 0000/00/00 not expected" shows, at this point, even you update the date, system will still regard this record as a error one and move the cost center and date information.

If you come across this issue, please remove the existing record and recreate a new line and maintain the cost center and data fields at the same time.

entry.title: Re: ABAP Call Monitor (SCMON) – Analyze usage of your code
entry.content:
HI Team,

i can see SCMON retention would be 365 days , but where we can maintain this data. as i know we daily house keeping job active and every 14 days data can be over write from DEV system. apart this where we can maintain retention data?

 

thanks

Kishore

entry.title: Re: email notification to offboarding task responsibles
entry.content: please use above triggers

entry.title: Re: MDG-M Standard Fields are not editable
entry.content:
Hi Rei,

whether a form field in the FPM GUIBB FormGL2.0 is read-only or not cannot be specified in the configuration, but can only be determined in the respective feeder class. So, to check the field properties (mandatory, enabled, read-only, visible) you should have a look at the output of method IF_FPM_GUIBB_FORM->GET_DATA in the feeder class.

Best regards,
Jens

entry.title: Re: Joule In Eclipse
entry.content: Thanks

entry.title: Re: Sample File Link on Detail Screen - Agent Performance Management
entry.content: I want to add a sample file to a detail screen as a link that opens in the new tab when clicked.

entry.title: Re: cannot validate mapping
entry.content: @user116  scroll up and see error message . seems like some field mapping in job info entity causin an issue

entry.title: Re: Automatic Goods Receipts for P.O : something new ?

entry.title: Re: Fiori elements: returning values when doing intent ba...

entry.title: 2h2024 LMS Configuration Workbook Missing Reference Fields
entry.content:
After checking the latest workbook, I noticed that some reference fields are not included in the workbook. Could you please update them?

These Reference Fields:

  • Degree Types
  • Disability Classifications
  • Employee Classes
  • Language Skills
  • Security Clearance Types
  • Delivery Types
  • Designation Types
  • Job Locations
  • Locale Labels
  • Number Format Patterns
  • Report Groups

Thanks and best regards!

entry.title: Re: Can we set mandatory for attachments
entry.content: Thank you for your answer. Can we also limit the entity edit to a particular custom form? My understanding is that entity edit is triggered whenever anything is saved to the said entity.

entry.title: Re: Can i have a task in Onboarding 2 that only send noti...
entry.content: @Ansie_Roux right now only reminders can be sent based on start date.

entry.title: Re: Onboarding process is stuck in BPE after the second rehire verification
entry.content: Need to check logs ,please file support ticket

entry.title: Re: Sales cloud version 2 - App - Offline Functionality
entry.content:
Seems to be possible now!

https://help.sap.com/docs/help/23ec04ee830846958605622f27ff5c3d/30fd077afbdf435e981ace196fac668a.html?locale=en-US&parentHref=/whats-new/58f0cc34e3c141a793ba8dfb7fc47f21?locale=en-US%26lastSent=2025-03-25&parentName=What%27s+New+in+SAP+Sales+Cloud+Version%C2%A02

entry.title: Re: Behaviour of Edit Flow / OnBeforeCreate overide in a...
entry.content: Hi Sandeep, i know that the behaviour regarding the popup for key fields is like documented. I just thought that there might be sth which i missed to achieve the additional popup before that POST. So OnBeforeCreate unfortunately is not 100% "before" regarding drafts. Having two popups - one OnBefore and then key fields would be a no go anyway. Best regards, Robert

entry.title: Re: How will we see the inactive email on the new People...
entry.content:
Hi, 

In the latest people profile, the People Picker is no longer available but you can instead use the Global Header search, which provides the same functionality. The logged in user should have the permission "Include Inactive Employees in the search" under Manage Hires table in Role Based Permissions (RBP) and also enable the switch "Show inactive user in people search (requires Role-based Permissions)" in Company System and Logo Settings in order to search for inactive users in the Global Header search. Please refer to KBA 3527163 - Full Profile of the Latest People Profile FAQ - 2H 2024 - SAP for Me for more details.

entry.title: Re: EAM_WORKFLOW_AGENTS_BADI | Usage of MaintenanceOrderData
entry.content:

entry.title: Re: Can we send an email update to Managers when the empl...
entry.content:
Hi,

You can try to configure a workflow and set manager in the cc role. When the workflow is completed, it will send emails to cc roles.

entry.title: Re: With the new Full People Profile have a section like...
entry.content: In the full profile, Employee Information card will display UDF fields. Please refer to help document User Data in People Profile | SAP Help Portal for more details.

entry.content:
Hi,

I have the same error and check that the latest one is 5.4.1

There is no version 5.4.2

entry.title: How to create KPI in SAP Sales and Service Cloud V2?
entry.content:
Hello all,

I am unable to find any option to create KPI from Design Stories Can you please tell me steps or functionality is available.

entry.title: [PUBLIC] SAP Open Source Webinar: Apeiro Reference Architecture – Strengthening Digital Sovereignty
entry.content:
Europe is investing in innovative cloud solutions which harmonize regulatory frameworks to build a resilient, secure digital future with its IPCEI-CIS initiative around next generation cloud infrastructures and services. The Apeiro Reference Architecture (ApeiroRA) is part of this initiative and aims to build a high-performance cloud-edge infrastructure with open-source standards.

 

Join us on May 8th at 3:00 pm CEST, 6:30 pm IST for a public webinar about ApeiroRA and the new NeoNephos Foundation. Peter Giese, Head of the SAP Open Source Program Office will give you an overview why and how this project has been transferred into the new NeoNephos Foundation, which will serve as a neutral entity dedicated to fostering open collaboration and governance. Vasu Chandrasekhara, Chief Product Owner of the Apeiro Project will explain the landscape of Apeiro RA with an overview on the architecture and components. Learn and discuss, which software and data sharing tools build up this European cloud-edge continuum and get a glimpse into some of its functionality.

 

Speakers: Peter Giese, Head of the SAP Open Source Program Office and Vasu Chandrasekhara, Chief Product Owner of the Apeiro Project, SAP

Host: SAP Open Source Program Office

Register here: SAP Sign-Up

entry.title: Re: SAP Opens Restaurant
entry.content: Nicely done, Paul, always fun to read 🙂

entry.title: Unable to activate the Goods Receipt Confirmations Communication Scenario in S/4HANA Public Cloud
entry.content: We are trying to access the Goods Receipt Confirmations Standard API from the SAP Business Accelerator Hub for S/4HANA Public Cloud. However, the required Communication Scenario (SAP_COM_0782) is not available for activation in the public cloud.

entry.title: Blog series on my CPI + Camel learning journey - Part5 - MPL custom app
entry.content:
Link back to index: https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/blog-series-on-my-cpi-camel-learning-journey/ba-p/14031053

Ok, in this one we will cover Message Processing Log (MPL) and APIs we have for it so that we could build ourselves something more "lightweight" in terms of performance on one side but also pro-code and camel oriented on another.

Motivation and a little bit of API and entities we use.

My main motivation was - "oh god, the standard app is such a mess, I'll make myself a better one..." after I first had to really troubleshoot some pre-packaged iflow.

But of course, there is a good reason for this - like low-code visual mapping of RunSteps to iflow bpmn etc.

Anyway, after I implemented this one, I completely abandoned the official cpi MPL app.

So, what do we have there in terms of API and entities exposed by it?

Yeah, right.. and in terms of actual OData entities the "entry point" is indeed this guy: MessageProcessingLogs

And one important thing to mention about this guy is it does not support orderby... meaning you either need to fetch all the dataset you filtered to sort it on frontend side, OR you have entries sorted somehow (not even by guid). So in my implementation I decided to keep OData top/skip pagination in place for the sake of performance, so you only have entries sorted in descending order if result set is less than 50 messages.

But what the original diagram does NOT mention the most interesting relation we have there - and use in our app actually - Runs nav property that leads to MessageProcessingLogRuns

And this is where things get interesting, so I will make another diagram to show you actual relations my app uses:

Btw if  you prefer to play with API, I have some mpl requests in test/requests folder

So, what do we have there?

Comparing to the original app which uses Master-Detail layout with all the stuff mixed on the Detail page (coming from god knows where and leading you also somewhere if you manage to find the right link to press), we just use FCL layout (Master-Detail-Detail) to follow (almost) exactly the relationship between entities we identified earlier.

Therefore:

  • Master (List Report) is indeed MessageProcessingLogs
  • Detail is single MessageProcessingLogs (which I kinda "blended" with artifact this message belonged to) + to-many relation to MessageProcessingLogRuns (though I haven't see the case with more than one Run per message yet) + in case of an error we display  MessageProcessingLogErrorInformations content (which is binary but text)
  • Detail-Detail is basically just all  MessageProcessingLogRunSteps within that Run (plus some additional stuff and some magic on frontend side)

What it gives us is consistency of our UX with no dependency on the Log Level settings.

So, in short it looks like this:

Basically, only List Report page with filters and Detail-Detail with actual Steps are of any significance, cuz the middle one is just a place to put some links (to cpi) and buttons (to set log level)

And yes, this one is a freestyle app rather than fiori elements + fpm - if it tells you something - and it was really nice to finally recall some stuff I enjoyed implementing back in the good old days 🙂

Ironically, it was only later that I discovered similar screen in standard app with steps and Activities.

You can compare it to screenshots above - we just display all that stuff at one place (and much faster!).

Ok, but where is Camel?

Well, it turns out that RunSteps could be more or less mapped to elements of our iflows, where Activities within those steps would be our camel processors.

Let's check out this table with screenshots from Detail-Detail screen of our simple Basics_Exception_Subprocess flow with End event (handled exception) and compare it with our blueprint.

 
 
 
 
 
 
 

Basically, what happens here is we just see the "path our route followed and steps involved" (and in more complicated iflows we would see choices and loops of course).

This is, I believe, the reason why they had to add "Integration Flow Model" tab - to display correlation between run steps and bpmn representation of iflow (we are low-code, right?).

But for us - who only care about camel representation of our iflows - this is completely unnecessary, and this is where our app gains a lot in terms of performance (ok, I also fetch all the steps info at once, so it helps a lot)!

And here's our iflow just for the reference (to compare with steps in the table above)

About UX consistency across Log Levels

In short, this is what we get based on Log Level settings (in order of increasing verbosity):

Log  LevelBehaviour
NoneNo entry in MPL
ErrorONLY Failed messages get entry in MPL (but MPL Attachments are NOT created automatically for faulty processors)
InfoRun Steps ONLY for Failed messages (WITH MPL Attachments from faulty processors)
DebugRun Steps for all messages
Trace
On top of Debug we now have TraceMessages (with Message Body and Headers + Exchange Properties) that expire after some time.

So, one final thing before the demo (where we will see all this in action) is to repeat again that our UX stays the same (Master-Detail-Detail) in all cases, the only difference being that sometimes we don't get Run Steps, therefore cannot see anything on Detail-Detail, and obviously, when log level is set to None, we dont't have messages in Master list at all, while in Trace mode we have extra stuff in Run Steps (as links).

Another minor thing is we always display an Error on our Detail page if there was one at some steps, because we still have some data in related MessageProcessingLogErrorInformations (it feels to me that it's just the last Error/Exception happened during processing). So I decided to keep it (kinda as an indicator that there were some exceptions thrown in the flow), while in the original app they hide it for Completed messages.

Demo part

Here we will play with our friend Basics_Exception_Subprocess iflow again while changing log levels and error/end termination events.

00:00 Intro and motivation

01:07 Difference in UX between the original mpl app and new one (Master-Detail vs FCL)

02:58 Some hints on sorting of log items (and pagination) and list report conveniences (like click to filter)

04:33 Scenario1 - Escalation end + TRACE log level

10:55 Mysterious publishAlertInfo step from sap-alert component

11:35 Regarding Trace Messages expiration

13:28 Scenario2 - Escalation end + DEBUG log level

16:58 Scenario3 - End Message end + DEBUG log level

20:24 Scenario4 - End Message end + INFO log level

21:35 Scenario5 - Error end + INFO log level

26:17 Scenario6 - Error end + ERROR log level

27:25 NONE log level + outro

P.S.

As we saw, the app does not cover all the possible relations to entities from original diagram (like storage part) and of course, I will add some features once I encounter it myself, but any feedback regarding missing features based on your typical flow would be highly appreciated!

Cuz I believe this thing alone could be easily made deployable to CF as a part of "CPI companion suite", and maybe I will write a blog about it later.

entry.title: Re: Birthday and Anniversary alerts to the employees in SuccessFactors
entry.content:
Hi Dharmin,

Thanks for the detailed info 🙂

could you pls help us in clarifying below

1. Can we include CC recipients in the alert or notification Anniversary mailers

2. Also can we include birthday and work anniversary poster on the mail body

Looking forward to your response 🙂

entry.title: How to change the company address
entry.content:
How to change the company address


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to change the company address
entry.content:
Please refer KBA: 2602869 - How to change the company address for your customer number - SAP for Me - SAP for Me

If a customer's address data needs to be changed or updated, contact the SAP Account Manager and include the information below. If you do not know who your SAP Account Manager is, refer to KBA 2626344.

  • Customer Number
  • Customer Name
  • Old Address
  • New Address
  • Letterhead showing updated address (if available)
  • Indicate if the change is for the main address for the company or if an alternate address should be listed

The SAP Account Manager will do what is necessary to change the customer's address with SAP Order Management (contractual team).

entry.title: Re: ABAP Call Monitor (SCMON) – Analyze usage of your code
entry.content:
Hi Kishore,

see above in the blog: in order to collect and store the usage data for a longer period of time, you should use transaction SUSG. See also Aggregate usage data in your production system with SUSG transaction.

Kind Regards,
Olga.

entry.title: What’s New in SAP Build – Q1 2025 Release Highlights
entry.content:
SAP Build continues to evolve to support how modern teams work — now with more artificial intelligence, flexibility, and speed. In Q1 2025, we delivered a wave of innovations across SAP Build Code, Process Automation, Apps, and Work Zone to help developers and business users turn ideas into enterprise-ready solutions faster than ever.

Whether you're building custom apps, creating SAP S/4HANA extensions, or streamlining processes, these updates will help you move from concept to value more efficiently.  Let's review the top 10 updates we selected from last quarter.

Licensing and Availability Updates

1. SAP Task Center Now included with SAP Build Work Zone

SAP Task Center is now embedded in all SAP Build Work Zone editions, giving users a unified view of workflow tasks from multiple SAP systems — right within their Work Zone homepage. No separate integration is required. This update also extends to partner licensing, making including Task Center in custom Work Zone scenarios easier. The result is faster approvals, centralized task tracking, and higher productivity for business users and managers — all in one workspace.

2. SAP Build Apps Now Available in More Regions

You can now deploy SAP Build Apps in EU11 and Sydney data centers, bringing your applications to more users. The increased coverage improves app responsiveness, supports region-specific compliance needs, and enables global scalability for your enterprise use cases.

Joule for Developers Updates

3. Generate End-to-End Workflows with a Prompt

In SAP Build Process Automation, developers can now describe business scenarios in natural language — and let generative AI create forms, decisions, and process flows automatically. Powered by SAP's purpose-built large language models (LLMs), this capability delivers contextualized, SAP-aware outcomes that speed up workflow creation and reduce manual effort. It also empowers business users to contribute to process design without writing code.

4. Generate UI Pages from Data in SAP Build Apps

SAP Build Apps now uses generative AI to propose user interface pages based on your data model. For example, if your app contains entities like Books, Authors, or Genres, Joule recommends corresponding screens, layouts, and controls. This helps teams move quickly from data modeling to interactive UI design, shortening prototyping cycles and improving design consistency.

5. Use Generative AI for Fiori UI Creation in SAP Build Code

Developers can now use Joule in SAP Build Code to generate Fiori-based UIs for existing CAP or mobile apps by entering a command like <code>/add-ui</code> or selecting the Joule icon in the Storyboard. Joule understands your application structure and proposes relevant layouts, controls, and navigation patterns, helping you scaffold front-end apps quickly and focus on customization instead of starting from scratch.

6. Multi-Agent Support for CAP App Generation

SAP Build Code now uses multi-agent support powered by Joule to generate complete CAP applications. Each agent focuses on a specific part — like data models, services, or UI — so you get a more complete project from a single prompt. This enhancement saves time and helps you focus on business logic instead of building everything from scratch.

Read also Overview of all GenAI Options in SAP Build Code by david_bizer.

Enhance SAP Business Suite Applications

7. Extend SAP S/4HANA with Custom UIs (Planned for Release Soon)

Coming very soon in SAP S/4HANA Cloud, Public Edition, developers will be able to use the SAP Build Extensibility Wizard to create side-by-side extensions—either by customizing existing SAP Fiori apps or building entirely new web applications. This approach enables teams to meet specific business needs while preserving the core system, supporting clean core principles and long-term agility.

  • See documentation: Using the Extensibility Wizard.
  • On setup, read the blog SAP Build Extensibility Wizard for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition by @Karthik-Thiru. 

8. New Enhancements for Guided Experiences by SAP Build

New enhancements to Guided Experiences by SAP Build help simplify complex processes like employee onboarding, parental leave, procurement approvals, and IT service management, where multiple steps, systems, and stakeholders are involved. With this release, ready-to-use content packages for SAP SuccessFactors Employee Onboarding and Cross-boarding are now available in the SAP Build Store—enabling faster rollout of consistent, step-by-step guidance for new hires and internal transfers.

  • To get started: Guided Experiences powered by SAP Build by florian_buech.
  • Watch the 2-minute video: Navigating Parental Leave with SAP Build Guided Experiences.

9. Intermediate Message Events for Real-Time Workflows

With new support for intermediate message events, SAP Build Process Automation lets workflows pause until specific API-triggered inputs are received and resume automatically. This powerful capability reduces wait times and manual monitoring, helping teams design more adaptive and responsive processes with fewer errors and overhead. 

Boost Developer Productivity

10. Revamped Project Overview in SAP Build Code

A redesigned Project Overview in SAP Build Code provides a clean, tree-based view of all app components, supporting CAP Java and CAP Node. This enhanced layout integrates with the Storyboard, making it easier for developers to navigate complex projects, onboard new team members, and stay focused while building.

Ready to See These Updates in Action?

These are just a few of the top updates rolling out this quarter. Want to explore the new features in more detail, see live demos, and get your questions answered by product experts?

👉Join us on April 15 for the What's New in SAP Build Q1 2025 webinar.
Reserve your spot to discover these updates in action. Register below:

📅There are two options to cover different time zones.
🕘9:00 – 10:00 AM CET → https://sap.to/604200bfg
🕔5:00 – 6:00 PM CET → https://sap.to/604500bfc

Learn More

For a complete list of new features, check out the following resources:

  • SAP Build Help Portal
  • SAP Build Road Map Explorer

Please stay current and connect with fellow SAP Builders by joining our Application Development and Automation Community for the latest updates, activities, and challenges.

entry.title: Re: LDAP.js Error: LdapErr:DSID-0C060810
entry.content:
Hi, 
I hope that you figure out and solve your problem.
I have a question - did you use ldap with cap project (nodeJS) on BTP ?
If yes, can you explain me how do you create connection to the ldap ? The BTP is very restricted and don't make the option to access the server.

Can you please help to check with your experts again?

entry.title: Re: ATP & MRP Areas
entry.content: Bear in mind that Alternative-Based Confirmation is part of aATP (advanced ATP), not standard ATP.

entry.title: Re: Web Service security Namespace in the SOAP Header in SAP PI
entry.content: Hi, We´re having the same problem, did you find a solution? KR.

entry.title: SAC - currency conversion across three currencies
entry.content:
Hi community,

lets say I have currency conversion rates with many source currencies  (eg USD, GBP) and one target currency (EUR). And now I would like to convert USD to GBP. In the conversion table, I dont have the conversion rate between these two currencies, but it could be calculated, as we have the rates for USD to EUR as well as GBP to EUR.

In SAP Learning, I have found this information: "However, rates won't be automatically combined to perform indirect conversion across three or more currencies (for example, first CAD to EUR, and then EUR to USD)."

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_ANALYTICS_CLOUD/00f68c2e08b941f081002fd3691d86a7/9348d55977e94994ab27bf031389d8f2.html?locale=en-US

Maybe there is a known workaround (within SAC)?

Will this functionality be added to SAC in the future?

Kind regards,

Eric

entry.title: Re: How to create an IM PI document for a SLOC which is t...
entry.content:
To create an IM PI document for an empty SLOC in MI01, follow these steps:
1. Create a dummy material (if allowed) or use a temporary material for the inventory document.
2. Enter the SLOC and the dummy material in MI01, then save the document.
3. Post the physical inventory count (you can adjust later).
4. After posting, remove the dummy item and add the actual material stock via a goods receipt (MB1C or MIGO).
Alternatively, consider posting a physical inventory document with a zero balance and then adding the new material stock through a separate transaction.

entry.title: Re: Why the expiry date of SF "Certified Professional" in...
entry.content: Hi All - I found my SFSF Professional Certification is shown as "Expired on March 31, 2025" today (1 Apr 2025), which is NOT the expected outcome as the Support Team replied above. Much appreciated if anyone know how to get this resolved.
